subject: feat(pwa): fix install prompt race condition, sync CLAUDE.md with glow-props
body:
Adds inline <script> in index.html to capture beforeinstallprompt before
Vue modules load — fixes race condition on repeat visits where cached SW
fires the event before the framework mounts.

Updates usePWAInstall.ts to consume early-captured event from window,
with fallback listener for first-visit case.

Syncs CLAUDE.md with glow-props reference patterns:
- Cross-project reference section for future checks
- Suggested Implementations (PWA, debug, icons, timer cleanup)
- "Check build tools before building" AI note

Tags: pwa, documentation, cross-project
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa
Semver: patch
